phase_goal: Create a reviewable mission-first discovery packet with explicit evidence posture.
question_prompts: What is the highest-signal decision the PM needs from discovery?
Which evidence is observed versus inferred for PM superpower recovery mission?

task_queue.title: Discovery task 1
task_queue.summary: Frame the problem in customer language before solution framing expands.

success_metrics.metric_name: time from intake to reviewable PRD
success_metrics.target_signal: Discovery should improve time from intake to reviewable prd without weakening reviewability.

recommended_pm_actions.summary: Approve the bounded discovery packet only after the evidence trail and next decision stay legible.
recommended_pm_actions.assumption_note: Task content is maturity-aware scaffolding until workspace-specific evidence replaces the starter defaults.
